title: Macros are one of the powerful tools in trading. PERIOD.
author: macr0trader
selftext:
**(Explaining ICT macros in this post)**

Im digged so much into ICT concepts...in another fking level.

Trust me.

I know a lot, im doing this consistently, with payouyts proving me im right!

I dont need your money, im waking you up! SIMPLE!

You will never see me posting a payment link, NEVER!

Go and watch for yourself, look how macro works from xx:50 to xx:10! Dont belive me.

Market is manipulated pip by pip, you can predicts that consistently, PERIOD.

From xx:50 to xx:10 the market will place details for people who know how this machine works. Its almost a signal for the inside traders. The market give his hand to you, if you know what is happening.

Time in this markets everything. I prooved a lot of times that.

I can send you videos about ICT talking about macros and how price operate in that time window.

This is the fking truth.

And im glad this markets are manipulated and not random, so you know is not a casino 50/50 chance.

You can be a fking monster in this, and this is just the begining, i will share all i know for free, fk it.
